summary: The Silent died on floor 33 to The Collector. The primary cause was deck problem. Overall deck/build score: 81/100. The weakest area was deck quality (score 63/100). 0 critical issue(s) and 1 warning(s) were found.
top_mistakes: Deck Quality: Deck is acceptable but has room to improve — consider removing more basic cards and prioritising upgrades at rest sites.
boss_advice: Kill torch-head minions immediately — their Mega Debuff stacks and makes all incoming damage unblockable.
AoE cards (Crippling Cloud, Dagger Spray, Die Die Die) shine against The Collector.
Piercing Wail resets minion strength — use it after they've been buffed.
Entering at <60% HP is dangerous because the fight tests your frontloaded block.
The Collector summons torch-head minions that apply Mega Debuff. If you can't clear them quickly the debuff stacking leads to unblockable burst damage. AoE or fast single-target damage helps.
next_run_recommendations: Your deck has more basic cards than ideal. Look for card-removal opportunities at the next shop or ?-event.
Campsites should lean toward upgrades, not rests, once your HP is above 50%.
Aim for at least 25-30 cards by mid-Act 2. A thin deck with basics is worse than a thick deck with good cards.
priority_fixes: Your deck has more basic cards than ideal. Look for card-removal opportunities at the next shop or ?-event.
